name: Cochrane CD006982_pub5 analysis 1: Duration of initial hospitalisation (days)
citation: Cochrane review CD006982_pub5 (DOI 10.1002/14651858.CD006982.pub5). Generic inverse-variance (effect+SE as pre-computed by Cochrane; HR/OR/MD) data extracted via Pairwise70/cochrane-data-extractor; reference = metafor rma (REML) from pairwise70 ma4_metafor_validation.csv.
note: Engine REML reproduces the metafor pooled estimate to <5e-6 on this real Cochrane dataset. GIV = generic inverse-variance: studies carry effect+SE on the analysis scale (difference-scale, not exponentiated). Re-verify against the source review forest plot before external citation.
